zh.lifeSummary: Juliana Despencer是Almaric de Spencer和Amabel Maud de Cheyne的女兒，於1181年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾達林頓。她於大約1190年與William Bardolph結婚。她去世於1230年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Juliana Despencer是Almaric de Spencer和Amabel Maud de Cheyne的女儿，于1181年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾達林頓。她于大约1190年与William Bardolph结婚。她去世于1230年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Juliana Despencer was born in 1181, in Dallington, Northamptonshire, England as the daughter of Almaric de Spencer and Amabel Maud de Cheyne. She married William Bardolph about 1190. She died after 1230.

fr.lifeSummary: Juliana Despencer est née en 1181, à Dallington, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, fille de Almaric de Spencer et Amabel Maud de Cheyne. Elle a épousé William Bardolph environ 1190. Elle est décédée après 1230.

de.lifeSummary: Juliana Despencer wurde 1181 in Dallington, Northamptonshire, England, als Tochter von Almaric de Spencer und Amabel Maud de Cheyne geboren. Sie hat um 1190 William Bardolph geheiratet. Sie starb nach 1230.

it.lifeSummary: Juliana Despencer è nata il nel 1181 nel Dallington, Northamptonshire, England come figlia di Almaric de Spencer e Amabel Maud de Cheyne. Lei sposato William Bardolph circa 1190. Morì dopo il 1230.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliana Despencerは1181年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアダリントンでAlmaric de SpencerとAmabel Maud de Cheyneの娘として生まれた。約1190年にWilliam Bardolphと結婚した。彼女は1230年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana Despencer(은)는 1181년 영국 노르섬프토실르 댈링턴에서 Almaric de Spencer(와)과 Amabel Maud de Cheyne의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1190년 William Bardolph(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1230년 이후 사망했다.

mn.Newington, Kent, England: Newington, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Juliana Despencer nasceu em 1181, em Dallington, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra filha de Almaric de Spencer e Amabel Maud de Cheyne. Ela casou-se com William Bardolph aproximadamente 1190. Ela faleceu após 1230.

ru.lifeSummary: Juliana Despencer родилась в 1181 г. в местности даллингтон, нортамптоншир, Англия. Её родителей звали Almaric de Spencer и Amabel Maud de Cheyne. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Bardolph около 1190 г. Она умерла после 1230 г.

es.lifeSummary: Juliana Despencer nació en 1181, en Dallington, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra como hija de Almaric de Spencer y Amabel Maud de Cheyne. Se casó con William Bardolph aproximadamente 1190. Murió después de 1230.
